subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! In reply to thy letter, I am obliged to be brief: Praise thou God that thou hast succeeded in becoming a teacher of young Baha'ís
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید در جواب مجبور باختصارم شکر کن خدا را که موفق
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @work as worship
